title: 1a0da2e4 violates clang thread safety checks
body:
@stephenry would you mind taking a look please?

You need to configure with clang and promoted warnings:
```
 ./configure --enable-longtests --enable-ccwarn CXX=clang++
```
Then try:
```
cd test_regress
./t/t_alw_split.pl --vltmt
```

Should say:
```
In file included from /home/gl/work/verilator/src/test_regress/../include/verilated.cpp:25:
/home/gl/work/verilator/src/test_regress/../include/verilated_imp.h:534:41: error: reading variable 'm_fdps' requires holding mutex 's_s.m_fdMutex' [-Werror,-Wthread-safety-analysis]
                if (VL_LIKELY(idx < s_s.m_fdps.size()))
                                        ^
/home/gl/work/verilator/src/test_regress/../include/verilated_imp.h:535:37: error: reading variable 'm_fdps' requires holding mutex 's_s.m_fdMutex' [-Werror,-Wthread-safety-analysis]
                    fp[out++] = s_s.m_fdps[idx];
                                    ^
/home/gl/work/verilator/src/test_regress/../include/verilated_imp.h:541:57: error: reading variable 'm_fdps' requires holding mutex 's_s.m_fdMutex' [-Werror,-Wthread-safety-analysis]
                if (fdi & VL_MASK_I(1)) fp[out++] = s_s.m_fdps[i];
                                                        ^
```
